events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1006. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Chinatown.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken with Creamy Polenta
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Minestrone with Whole-Grain Roll
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Tuscan White Bean Soup
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 413/550 mg ✓, carbs 53 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/550 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 351/550 mg ✓, carbs 41 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1006 added to route R-CHIN-1 (Chinatown), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1006: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
